title: hieracium murorum subsp. phaeoides
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. phaeoides, also known as Wall Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. phaeoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
